scope.summary: Route profile/configuration load failures to the dedicated doctor Configuration check and skip the connectivity probe for that distinct failure class.
out_of_scope: Changing profile parsing or validation semantics.
Changing database connectivity, authentication, or network diagnostics.

entry_points.name: oraclemcp doctor
entry_points.trace: DoctorProfileContext routes config-load failures into DoctorContext.configuration_error. run_doctor adds the Configuration check, which reports the named configuration failure and fix guidance, while Connectivity is skipped rather than reporting a database or network failure.

limitations: The close relies on code-path review and the scoped plsql-intelligence compile gate; no live Oracle connection or malformed on-disk profiles fixture was used.
